display.purpose: Marketing heroes only; not workbench chrome.

title.purpose: Card titles, tab triggers, sidebar items.

body.purpose: Default UI copy; max 65–75ch in prose.

shadows.name: marketing-lift
shadows.purpose: Legacy marketing sections only; not workbench cards.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default transition-all on buttons and interactive controls.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Preferred entrance/exit when animation is required; no bounce.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default workbench CTA; ink fill on light canvas.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 1.75rem; padding: 0 0.5rem; gap: 0.25rem; font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.35; color: var(--primary-foreground); background: var(--primary); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: calc(var(--radius) * 0.8); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.1s; outline: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--primary) 80%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring) 30%, transparent); border-color: var(--ring); } .ds-btn-primary:active:not([aria-haspopup]) { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 1.75rem; padding: 0 0.5rem; font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--foreground); background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: calc(var(--radius) * 0.8); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--input) 50%, transparent); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring) 30%, transparent); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary/icon-adjacent actions in sidebars and tables.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 1.75rem; padding: 0 0.5rem; font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--foreground); background: transparent; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: calc(var(--radius) * 0.8); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: var(--muted); color: var(--foreground); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring) 30%, transparent); }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.description: Irreversible actions; tinted destructive, not solid red fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 1.75rem; padding: 0 0.5rem; font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--destructive); background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--destructive) 10%, transparent); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: calc(var(--radius) * 0.8); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--destructive) 20%, transparent); } .ds-btn-destructive:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in oklch, var(--destructive) 20%, transparent); }

components.name: Default Card
components.description: Grouped content; ring elevation, no drop shadow.
components.html:
Watch events

Filesystem callbacks appear here.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; padding: 1rem; background: var(--card); color: var(--card-foreground); border-radius: var(--radius); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--foreground) 10%, transparent); font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.35; } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.45; color: var(--muted-foreground); max-width: 65ch; }

components.name: Segmented Tabs
components.description: Workbench header tabs (Files / Runtime / Preview pattern).
components.css: .ds-tabs-list { display: flex; gap: 0.25rem; padding: 0.25rem; background: var(--muted); border-radius: calc(var(--radius) * 0.8); } .ds-tab { flex: 1; min-width: 0; height: 1.75rem; padding: 0 0.5rem; font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--muted-foreground); background: transparent; border: none; border-radius: calc(var(--radius) * 0.6); cursor: pointer; } .ds-tab:hover { color: var(--foreground); } .ds-tab-active { background: var(--background); color: var(--foreground); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); } .ds-tab:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--ring); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Standard single-line input on workbench forms.
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; max-width: 24rem; height: 1.75rem; padding: 0 0.5rem; font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--foreground); background: var(--background); border: 1px solid var(--input); border-radius: calc(var(--radius) * 0.8); outline: none; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--muted-foreground); } .ds-input:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring) 30%, transparent); border-color: var(--ring); } .ds-input[aria-invalid="true"] { border-color: var(--destructive); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in oklch, var(--destructive) 20%, transparent); }

narrative.overview: OpenClaw Web is a product surface: a browser-hosted developer environment. Visual design serves density, legibility, and long sessions. The system stacks Figma Bits UI kit on shadcn-svelte + Tailwind v4 primitives with OKLCH semantic tokens. Workbench chrome uses restrained neutrals; legacy marketing shell retains purple accent variables. Figma is normative for component shape and states via docs/design/BitsUI.md.
keyCharacteristics: Inter Variable as single sans workhorse

rules.name: The Figma-First Rule
rules.body: Any new button, input, dialog, or tab state must be traceable to a row in docs/design/BitsUI.md before merge.

rules.name: The One-Violet Rule
rules.body: Marketing violet appears on ≤10% of any workbench screen. Workbench actions use ink primary, not Signal Violet.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Black Rule
rules.body: Never set #000 or #fff. Use OKLCH canvas/ink tokens or tinted legacy variables.

rules.name: The Compact UI Rule
rules.body: Inside $lib/components/ui/*, default to text-xs and text-xs/relaxed. Do not import marketing 56px headings into product routes.

rules.name: The Inter-Is-Baseline Rule
rules.body: Inter is the project default, not a differentiator. Pair with spacing, hierarchy, and Figma-accurate states.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces sit flat at rest. Hover states adjust background opacity, not Y-translate stacks, except subtle active translate on buttons.

rules.name: The Ring-Not-Card-Grid Rule
rules.body: Prefer bordered sections and sidebar grouping over identical shadowed card matrices.

dos: Do open docs/design/BitsUI.md and the linked Figma node before changing any control variant or spacing.
Do use semantic tokens (bg-background, text-muted-foreground, border-border) in new Svelte routes and features.
Do keep body copy within 65–75ch in readable prose areas.
Do use OKLCH tokens from apps/claw-container/src/app.css as the single source of truth for theme changes.
Do match Bits UI dark variants when implementing dark: Tailwind classes.
Do prefer inline panels, tabs, and sidebars over modals for frequent actions.
donts: Don't ship purple-to-blue gradients, neon glows, or glassmorphism as default chrome.
Don't use border-left or border-right >1px as a colored accent stripe on lists, alerts, or cards.
Don't use background-clip: text gradient headings.
Don't lay out features as identical icon + title + blurb card grids without a Figma reference.
Don't default to Inter + purple accent as the only brand move.
Don't use pure #000 / #fff or untinted gray text on tinted backgrounds.
Don't animate layout properties or use bounce/elastic easing.
Don't open a modal when a tab, drawer, or inline expansion can carry the flow.
Don't invent component styles that contradict the Bits UI kit.
